news.summary: In Barcelona, Spain on April 9, 2025, Oxolife, a biotech company specializing in female fertility, revealed its mission to improve live birth rates through enhanced embryo implantation during assisted reproductive technology (ART) treatments. Agnès Arbat, the company's Chief Executive Officer, shared this news.
news.headline: Oxolife's CEO Agnès Arbat wins EU Women Innovators Prize for female fertility biotech innovations in embryo implantation.
China's Premier Li: We are prepared to deal with uncertainties - CCTV

news.summary: In Galway, Ireland, as of April 9, 2025, TE Connectivity, a renowned company in connectors and sensors, has successfully cut down Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions by a remarkable 80% from September 2020 to October 2024. This achievement exceeded their initial target of a 70% reduction. This accomplishment highlights their commitment to sustainability efforts and sets a positive example for the industry.
news.headline: TE Connectivity exceeded its goal by reducing Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions by 80% between Sept 2020 and Oct 2024.
China's Premier Li: China's economy continues an upward recovery trend in Q1 - CCTV
China's Premier Li: We should be aware external shocks to China's economic stabilisation create some pressures- CCTV.

news.summary: Chicago-based Trucking Hub revealed on April 9, 2025, the introduction of its exclusive artificial intelligence (AI) technology tailored for the trucking sector. This innovation is integrated into its Transportation Management system, optimizing operations for trucking companies.
news.headline: Trucking Hub launches AI for trucking industry in Chicago; revolutionizing TMS with industry-trained AI.
Hungary's Foreign Min. (Szijjarto): Hungary to vote 'no' on EU's counter-tariffs vs the US
Ancora: US steel and Nippon steel deal close is 'seemingly probable"

news.summary: In Xi'an, China, as of April 9, 2025, the Shaanxi Provincial Department of Culture and Tourism announced a new policy. Effective from December 17, 2025, China will implement a more flexible transit visa-free policy for visitors from eligible countries. This updated policy aims to attract more tourists and boost the tourism industry. Travelers will benefit from eased entry restrictions, enhancing the overall travel experience.
news.headline: Starting December 17, 2025, China will offer a 240-hour transit visa-free stay in Shaanxi, benefiting travelers from various countries.

news.summary: ZEISS is at the forefront of medical innovation in neuro tumor therapy with its latest treatment platform for intraoperative radiotherapy. This leading provider of medical solutions in neurosurgery is based in JENA, Germany. The new treatment platform is set to revolutionize neuro tumor therapy by offering cutting-edge technology that enhances treatment outcomes. The platform integrates advanced radiotherapy techniques, offering patients a more precise and effective treatment option. This development marks a significant advancement in neurosurgery, with ZEISS playing a pivotal role in shaping the future of medical innovation.
news.headline: ZEISS gains FDA approval for INTRABEAM 700, enhancing neuro tumor therapy with innovative technology. Jena, Germany, April 9, 2025.

news.summary: A significant number of everyday Indians have entered the stock trading arena, enticed by convenient online platforms and a flourishing market. However, a large proportion of these newcomers are now facing unexpected setbacks.
news.headline: Millions of new Indian investors facing market turmoil as they enter stock trading, many experiencing unexpected setbacks.

news.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Kraken has teamed up with Mastercard to introduce crypto debit cards in the UK and Europe, expanding its payment options. This partnership allows Kraken, pursuing a license under the EU's regulatory framework, to offer a new channel for users to spend cryptocurrencies and stablecoins. The rollout will commence soon, with a waitlist now open. The collaboration builds on the success of Kraken Pay, a tool introduced in January 2025, enabling customers to send over 300 crypto assets globally using a paylink feature. This move aligns with the rising trend of crypto payments in the industry, aiming to enhance the utility of cryptocurrencies in daily transactions. David Ripley, Kraken's co-CEO, envisions a future where global commerce is backed by crypto, emphasizing the importance of seamless crypto payments. The partnership with Mastercard is a significant step in achieving this goal. Kraken's growth trajectory and user engagement continue to show promise, with further updates expected.
news.headline: Kraken and Mastercard partner to launch crypto debit cards in Europe and UK, expanding payment options with impending rollout.
China meeting: The economy is resilient despite external factors

news.summary: XCMG Machinery showcased its latest advancements at bauma 2025, the prominent construction machinery trade fair in Munich. The company, listed as SHE: 000425, is focused on accelerating its growth in Europe by providing localized services, implementing green technology, and forming strategic partnerships. This move is aimed at enhancing its presence and market share in the region, highlighting XCMG's commitment to innovation and sustainability.
news.headline: XCMG presented innovative solutions at bauma 2025, focusing on green technology and strategic partnerships to boost European growth.
Former US Treasury Secretary Summers: The US may be headed for a 'serious financial crisis"

news.summary: Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. (1157.HK), a prominent player in construction machinery worldwide, is unveiling its newest technologies at bauma 2025 with the theme "Greener Development, Brighter Future" in Munich from April 7 to 13.
news.headline: Zoomlion presents latest innovations at bauma 2025, highlighting green, intelligent technologies. Event runs April 7-13 in Munich.

news.summary: A recent report by a blockchain analytics company has disclosed that approximately $30 million worth of Official Melania (CRYPTO: MELANIA) meme tokens were discreetly sold, shedding light on concerns regarding the project team's credibility and Hayden Davis. The Solana-based tokens were transferred from community funds without any clarification from the project team or Davis, who admitted to co-founding the MELANIA meme coin. Specifically, 50 million MELANIA coins were moved to wallet "Cq2Tj6" and subsequently dispersed to various other addresses. Notably, more than $3 million was sent to centralized exchanges, two new positions valued at $6 million each were created, and $500,000 has already been cashed out.
news.headline: Over $30M in Official Melania meme coins quietly sold, funds moved to various wallets by project team without explanation.

news.summary: In Bentonville, Arkansas, Walmart (NYSE: WMT) is currently holding its Investment Community Meeting to discuss strategies for growth and enhancing shareholder value. The focus is on their people-focused, technology-driven omnichannel approach, emphasizing their ability to maintain strong growth and deliver returns to shareholders. CEO Doug McMillon stated that the successful blend of a purposeful, employee-centric culture with top-tier technology is the key to their success.
news.headline: Walmart outlines growth strategy at Investor Meeting, cites tech-led omnichannel approach for attractive returns.

news.summary: Kalibrate, based in Dallas, has unveiled upgraded artificial intelligence capabilities for its Kalibrate Location Intelligence (KLI) platform. This enhancement, powered by Microsoft Azure AI Foundry, allows retail, restaurant, and healthcare brands to swiftly make data-informed decisions regarding their physical locations. By integrating Azure AI Foundry, Kalibrate can expedite the creation of cutting-edge location analytics tools, including natural language processing for geospatial queries. This development aims to aid in assisting businesses in optimizing their brick-and-mortar portfolios efficiently.
news.headline: Kalibrate enhances location platform with AI from Microsoft Azure Azure AI Foundry, aiding data-driven decisions for clients.

news.summary: Aviceda Therapeutics, based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, has announced the appointment of Dr. Emmett T. Cunningham, Jr. to its Board of Directors. Dr. Cunningham is a renowned ophthalmology expert and industry leader known for his innovative contributions to the field. This strategic move is expected to bring valuable expertise to the company's board as they further their mission in the ophthalmology sector.
news.headline: Aviceda Therapeutics appoints Dr. Cunningham to its board of directors in Cambridge, Mass, boosting industry expertise.

news.summary: In Chicago, Littelfuse, Inc. disclosed that Meenal Sethna, the Executive Vice President and CFO, will be resigning after a decade in the role. Sethna will continue in her position until September 1, 2025, to facilitate a seamless handover. Dr. Greg Henderson, the President and CEO of Littelfuse, acknowledged Sethna's contributions, stating that her departure marks the end of a successful era. Littelfuse (NASDAQ: LFUS) is a diverse industrial tech manufacturer dedicated to promoting a sustainable, interconnected, and safer global environment.
news.headline: Littelfuse CFO to step down after 10 years. Remaining until Sept 1, 2025 for transition.

news.summary: An announcement has been made by Asbury Automotive Group based in Duluth, Georgia regarding the scheduling of the release of their financial results for the first quarter of 2025. Interested parties can expect important financial figures and updates to be disclosed in the upcoming report. Stay tuned for further details on Asbury Automotive Group's performance in the mentioned period.
news.headline: Asbury Automotive Group plans to release its First Quarter 2025 financial results.

news.summary: In Midland, Texas, exploration and production company New Era Helium, Inc. (NEHC) has reported filing its Annual Report on Form 10-K with the SEC on March 31, 2025, for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2024. NEH, listed on Nasdaq as NEHC, focuses on sourcing helium from natural gas reserves in the Permian Basin. The company provided an operational update and development strategy overview. Additionally, NEH is collaborating with Peco on facility construction.
news.headline: New Era Helium (NEHC) updates on facility development in Permian Basin, files 10-K for year ending Dec 2024.
China adds more US firms to unreliable list

news.summary: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) is set to announce its fourth-quarter financial results on April 10, with analysts predicting earnings of 66 cents per share, a significant increase from the 32 cents per share reported last year. The company, headquartered in Richmond, Virginia, anticipates quarterly revenue to reach $5.97 billion, up from $5.63 billion in the same period the previous year. In the third quarter of 2024, CarMax exceeded expectations with its earnings and sales performance. Despite this, CarMax shares closed at $73.31 on Tuesday, showing a 0.6% decrease. For more detailed information, readers can refer to Benzinga Pro's Analyst Stock Ratings page for the latest insights and updates.
news.headline: CarMax (KMX) to report Q4 earnings on April 10, with projected EPS at 66 cents (up from 32 cents) and revenue at $5.97 billion (up from $5.63 billion in previous year). Shares fell 0.6% to $73.31.

news.summary: Stella-Jones Inc. (TSX: SJ) will host a conference call on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, at 8:00 AM Eastern Daylight Time to review its first-quarter results. This call is open to investors, analysts, and all interested parties. For live webcast access, visit https://meetings.lumiconnect.com/400-108-123-801 or dial (+1) 800 206-4400. The press release will be out before the market opens on the conference call day via Globe Newswire. Participants are advised to log in or dial in 15 minutes before the call. A web recording will be available following the meeting if you can't join at the specified time. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Stella-Jones to host first quarter results conference call on May 7, 2025, open to all. Live webcast available, call at (+1) 800 206-4400. Press release to be out before the call.

news.summary: Simply Good Foods Company reported financial results for the thirteen and twenty-six weeks ended March 1, 2025. Net sales for the second quarter were $359.7 million, with a net income of $36.7 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $68.0 million. Year-to-date net sales were $700.9 million, with a net income of $74.9 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $138.1 million. The company's outlook for fiscal year 2025 includes expecting net sales to increase 8.5% to 10.5%, and Adjusted EBITDA to increase 4% to 6%. The company's CFO announced his retirement, and a new CFO was appointed. The company aims to lead the nutritious snacking movement and expand its healthy lifestyle platform through innovation and growth opportunities.
news.headline: Simply Good Foods Company reported fiscal Q2 2025 results: Net sales $359.7M, net income $36.7M, adjusted EBITDA $68M, reaffirms FY 2025 outlook.

news.summary: A new dispensary in Middletown, Ohio is set to open soon, becoming the first in the area. Terrasana, a reputable cannabis retail brand in Ohio, will be launching this new location. This dispensary will serve the local community of Middletown and residents from Dayton to Cincinnati. The opening date is expected to be within the next few weeks. This development marks a significant addition to the cannabis retail landscape in the region.
news.headline: Terrasana to open Middletown's first cannabis dispensary, serving Dayton to Cincinnati. Opening soon in Ohio.

news.summary: In Brossard, Quebec, on April 9, 2025, G Mining Ventures Corp. (GMIN) disclosed the filing of a technical report compliant with National Instrument 43-101 Standards of Disclosure. Traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: GMIN) and over-the-counter markets (OTCQX: GMINF), the Corporation took this step for transparency. The report includes crucial data for stakeholders and investors to assess the Corporation's operations.
news.headline: G Mining Ventures files NI 43-101 report for Gurupi Gold Project in Brazil. TSX: GMIN, OTCQX: GMINF. Date: April 9, 2025.

news.summary: Chicago-based cybersecurity provider Keeper Security has surpassed over four million paid users worldwide as of April 9, 2025. The company is renowned for its zero-trust and zero-knowledge Privileged Access Management (PAM) software, ensuring the protection of users' cybersecurity on a global scale.
news.headline: Keeper Security has exceeded 4 million paid users globally due to increasing demand for cybersecurity solutions.

news.summary: According to a recent survey, over 50% of employees report experiencing Quiet Cracking, a condition characterized by lingering workplace dissatisfaction resulting in disengagement, subpar work output, and a heightened inclination to leave their jobs. The study was conducted in San Francisco on April 9, 2025 by TalentLMS, a renowned company specializing in employee management solutions.
news.headline: Survey finds over 50% of US employees experience Quiet Cracking, leading to disengagement and increased desire to quit.

news.summary: The early days of the Trump administration have seen a flurry of activities that signal forthcoming crypto regulations, with indications that cryptocurrencies may not be regulated as securities. However, critics have pointed out a lack of concrete changes in the form of new rules and guidance, with some labeling certain actions as mere theatrical maneuvers. The administration has taken steps to address the debanking issues faced by the crypto industry: repealing directives that hindered banks from dealing with cryptocurrencies, thus opening up banking to crypto. Additionally, various agencies have issued new guidance that could have significant impacts on crypto companies' access to banking services in the future. Notably, virtually every pending SEC case involving a cryptocurrency defendant has been dropped, suggesting a shift in enforcement priorities. The SEC has also ceased investigations into several crypto firms, indicating a changing perspective on the industry's regulatory landscape. Overall, these actions present a new approach to enforcing and regulating cryptocurrency in the United States under the Trump administration, with the potential to reshape the industry's interactions with traditional financial institutions.
news.headline: US gov't actions hint at new crypto rules; Trump admin dropped pending SEC cases; major banks now open to crypto. #regulation #cryptocurrency

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, The Simply Good Foods Company (Nasdaq: SMPL) shared financial results for the thirteen and twenty-six weeks concluded on March 1, 2025. The acquisition of Only What You Need, Inc. ("OWYN") was finalized on June 13, 2024. Therefore, the Company's performance for the thirteen and twenty-six weeks ended on February 24, 2024, does not include OWYN's results. In this update, "organic" or "legacy" Simply Good Foods refers to their business excluding OWYN.
news.headline: The Simply Good Foods Co. reports Q2 fiscal results, reaffirms FY 2025 outlook; acquired OWYN on June 13, 2024.

news.summary: Roots Corporation, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as ROOT, stated their plans for a Normal Course Issuer Bid for its Common Shares. The Toronto Stock Exchange has approved Roots' notice of intent to initiate this bid. As per the notice, Roots will repurchase a specified amount of Common Shares through the TSX or other Canadian trading systems. The purchased shares will adhere to TSX regulations and will subsequently be nullified. This move indicates Roots' strategic investment in their own stock.
news.headline: Roots plans to buy back Common Shares through a Normal Course Issuer Bid on TSX, following accepted notice.

news.summary: Neogen Corporation (NASDAQ: NEOG) revealed its Q3 results for the period ending February 28, 2025, showcasing progress in integration and strong performance in the Food Safety segment. President and CEO John Adent highlighted improvements despite a dip in sample collection revenue. The company continues to focus on enhancing sample collection production and reach.
news.headline: Neogen Corp (NASDAQ: NEOG) reports Q3 2025 results with solid performance in Food Safety segment despite lower sample collection revenue. CEO optimistic about progress.

news.summary: Peloton Interactive, Inc. has recently assigned Charles Kirol as the Chief Operating Officer and shared updates regarding various shifts in leadership within the company based in New York.
news.headline: Peloton appoints Charles Kirol as COO and makes other leadership changes to drive growth.

news.summary: Bunge Global SA, listed on NYSE as BG, is set to reveal its quarterly financial results for the period ending March 31, 2025, on May 7, 2025. The disclosure will occur before the opening of the market. Following this, the management will conduct a conference call at 7:00 a.m. Central Time to analyze the outcomes. Interested individuals can view a slide presentation related to this on www.bunge.com. For those wanting to participate in the webcast, they can visit the "Investor Center" section of the company's website and navigate to "Events & Presentations" under "News & Events".
news.headline: Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) to report Q1 2025 earnings on May 7, 2025, with conference call at 7:00 a.m. Central Time. More details on www.bunge.com.

news.summary: In Lansing, Michigan, Neogen® Corporation (NASDAQ: NEOG), a prominent figure in food safety solutions, disclosed the departure of John Adent, the CEO and President after serving for eight years with the Company. Mr. Adent will uphold his current positions until a new successor is chosen. The Board of Directors at Neogen has established a special committee involving Board Chair Jim Borel, Thierry Bernard, and Jeff Capello to oversee the quest for the new leader.
news.headline: Neogen® CEO John Adent to step down after 8 years. Board forms search committee for successor.

news.summary: In Raleigh, N.C., Merz Aesthetics® has revealed Salma Hayek Pinault as the inaugural global brand ambassador for Ultherapy PRIME, an innovative micro-focused ultrasound platform for customized skin lifting and tightening. Recognized as the world's largest dedicated medical aesthetics business, Merz Aesthetics® is leading the way in redefining the landscape of medical aesthetics. Ultherapy PRIME aims to lift and sculpt the skin of the upper face, offering a non-invasive solution for individuals seeking personalized treatments. This platform represents a significant advancement in the field of aesthetics, providing cutting-edge technology and results.
news.headline: Salma Hayek Pinault named Merz Aesthetics' brand ambassador for Ultherapy PRIME, promising nonsurgical skin treatments.

news.summary: A global medical aesthetics business, Merz Aesthetics®, has appointed actress, director, and producer Salma Hayek Pinault as the inaugural global brand ambassador for Ultherapy PRIME. Revolutionizing medical aesthetics, Ultherapy PRIME offers personalized non-invasive skin lifting through an advanced micro-focused ultrasound platform. This technology, FDA-cleared for neck, under the chin, and eyebrow skin lifting, marks a significant shift in the field.
news.headline: Salma Hayek Pinault named as global brand ambassador for Ultherapy PRIME®, an advanced skin lifting treatment platform by Merz Aesthetics®.

news.summary: Roots Corporation, a premium outdoor-lifestyle brand based in Toronto, reported its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on February 1, 2025. The company traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol ROOT. The results, disclosed in Canadian dollars unless specified otherwise, included both GAAP and non-IFRS measures. In Q4 2024, Roots achieved notable outcomes, with specific details on adjusted figures available in the provided disclosures.
news.headline: Roots Corporation reports Q4 2024 results; fiscal year ended Feb 1, 2025. Financials in Canadian dollars. Non-IFRS metrics included.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 9, 2025, Canadian Premium Sand Inc. (TSXV: CPS) announced the completion of an updated Inferred Mineral Resource Report for its Wanipigow Sand Project. The report, conducted by APEX Geoscience Ltd., with an effective date of April 9, 2025, includes the findings of additional sampling, processing, and testing. This was facilitated by core programs and bulk excavation carried out by CPS between 2022 and 2024.
news.headline: Canadian Premium Sand Inc. increases low-iron sand resource, with updated Inferred Mineral Resource Report for Wanipigow Sand Project.
China Finance Ministry: To impose additional tariffs on US goods from April 10.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd shared details regarding their performance in the first quarter of 2025. The company reported its preliminary deliveries, revenues, and cash margin for the period. As of March 31, 2025, Osisko also disclosed its cash and debt positions. The company trades as OR on both the TSX and NYSE. All financial figures mentioned in the update are denominated in US dollars, unless stated otherwise.
news.headline: Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd reports strong Q1 2025 GEO deliveries and cash margin. Cash and debt positions as of March 31, 2025.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) shared supplementary details on their first-quarter 2025 financial and operational performance. This data aims to offer insights into current estimates that could influence the results for the quarter. The disclosure is meant to aid investors, analysts, and other stakeholders in developing their own projections. It does not encompass all factors impacting the first quarter of 2025. Actual results and the effects of the factors mentioned may fluctuate due to unaccounted variables. The finalization of the financial reporting process for the first quarter of 2025 will determine the ultimate outcomes.
news.headline: APA Corporation released supplemental info on 1Q 2025 results. Conference call on May 8 at 10 a.m. Central Time.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 9, 2025, A.I.S. Resources Limited (TSXV: AIS, OTC-PINK: AISSF) disclosed the issuance of 500,000 incentive stock options to a director under its stock option plan. Each option permits the purchase of one common share at $0.06 per share, with immediate vesting and a five-year expiration period. The TSX Venture Exchange must approve the stock options for them to be effective.
news.headline: A.I.S. Resources grants 500,000 stock options at $0.06 each, vest upon grant, expire in 5 years. TSX Venture Exchange approval needed.
